name: quicktask-vscode
description: Reusable /qt task workflows for AI chat in VS Code.

chatParticipants.name: quicktask
chatParticipants.description: Run QuickTask /qt commands through shared core runtime

scripts.package:vsix: pnpm run build && mkdir -p ../../artifacts && pnpm exec vsce package --follow-symlinks --allow-missing-repository --out ../../artifacts/quicktask-vscode-v$npm_package_version.vsix
scripts.publish:marketplace: pnpm run package:vsix && pnpm exec vsce publish --packagePath ../../artifacts/quicktask-vscode-v$npm_package_version.vsix
